assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-34: The naming convention ('Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.'), the serena_backend example (mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol call), and the serena_backend limitation ('rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use') are all preserved verbatim. The only addition is line 34: '- `serena_ui`: No known limitations'.
